arts.ttl: Arsenal tipped to beat Barcelona & Real Madrid to Antoñito signing
arts.sum: Premier League giants Arsenal have this weekend been tipped to beat out competition from La Liga’s leading clubs, in the race for Málaga sensation Antoñito Cordero. Antoñito, for his part,…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid president Perez BLASTS Rodri's Ballon d'Or win
arts.sum: Real Madrid president Florentino Perez has taken a massive swipe at Rodri's Ballon d'Or win this year, doubling down on his club's controversial decision to boycott the award show last month. And now, at Real Madrid's general assembly, Perez has defended the decision and even taken aim at some of the nations who voted at the gala.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid president reopens Ballon d'Or feud and slams voting system
arts.sum: Florentino Perez insists one of three Real Madrid players - Vinicius Junior, Dani Carvajal or Jude Bellingham - should have won the Ballon d'Or 2024 ahead of Rodri.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé could be used in a new role for Real Madrid vs Leganés
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti is giving consideration to making use of the talents of Kylian Mbappé out wide in the club’s next outing. That’s according to Relevo, who…

arts.ttl: Leganes vs Real Madrid 2024 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Leganes in the first game after the FIFA break. Los Blancos should be more than capable of taking care of business tonight as they get ready for what should be a very crucial and tough match at Anfield next Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid news: Los Blancos line up Ancelotti replacement
arts.sum: A report has emerged from Revelo saying that the club have already identified Santiago Solari as the ideal candidate to step in as interim manager if Ancelotti gets the chop. Real Madrid have informed Santiago Solari that he will be the team's coach this season if the La Liga giants decide to sack Carlo Ancelotti, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Man United star is ready to reject Real Madrid in order to work with Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Excitement at Manchester United is high at the moment with players and fans looking to see what new manager Ruben Amorim can offer this season. Following the departure of Erik ten Hag, the club needed a manager who can bring fresh ideas and someone who has enjoyed success recently. arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Leganes-Real Madrid: Carlo Ancelotti to make three changes
arts.sum: Barcelona’s late collapse against Celta Vigo on Saturday night means that Real Madrid can close the gap at the top of the La Liga standings to one point with a victory against Leganes on Sunday. arts.ttl: Man United 'make approach' for Real Madrid midfielder as Ruben Amorim suffers rejection
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Eduardo Camavinga reportedly turns down an advance from Manchester United for a transfer to Old Trafford either in January or the summer.
